comment: Per-ASIN fit social proof for the buyer PDP (PREVENT). Backs GET /size-advice/{asin} (MT7). fit_distribution pcts sum to 100; headline_pct == the dominant 'sized up/down' bucket. Only sized items (footwear/apparel) carry a signal; the resale_hint is computed live in size.py from pricing + seeded buyers, so it isn't baked here.

B0SHOE500.advice: This pair runs small. 68% of UK-8 buyers ordered one size up — we suggest UK 9.

B0KURTA01.advice: This kurta has a slim cut. 54% of M buyers sized up to L for an easier fit.
